title: Complete Spinning Mill Setup
description: Full turnkey installation of a 30,000-spindle spinning mill including machinery supply, installation, and commissioning.

title: Weaving Plant Modernization
description: Upgraded a traditional weaving facility with 120 high-speed air-jet looms, increasing output by 40%.

title: Dye House Automation Project
description: Automated a dye house with smart dyeing machines and centralized process control for a major textile exporter.

title: Knitting Unit Expansion
description: Expanded a circular knitting operation with 24 new machines, doubling production capacity within six months.

title: Finishing Line Installation
description: Installed a complete stenter and finishing line for a home textile manufacturer serving European markets.

title: Spare Parts Distribution Hub
description: Established a centralized spare parts warehouse serving over 200 textile mills across the region.
